# Oh My Experience Full Documentation Map

Use this file to choose the smallest relevant document before reading the full
site.

## High priority

- /guides/quickstart - install, initialize, verify one recall explanation.
- /guides/first-card - turn one real correction into a reviewed card.
- /guides/examples - real prompt-time recall examples, including exact injected additional context.
- /guides/setup - data directory, hook install, skill install, uninstall.
- /guides/project-libraries - global dataDir, project libraries, and project-scoped global cards.
- /guides/codex - Codex prompt-time recall setup and status checks.
- /guides/claude - Claude prompt-time recall setup and status checks.
- /guides/reflect-review - candidate -> draft -> active review loop.

## Medium priority

- /guides/source-scan - Codex source scanning and optional Spool search-backed scanning.
- /guides/evaluation - deterministic recall evaluation and hook evaluation.
- /reference/cli - complete CLI command surface.
- /reference/config - configuration schema and data directory behavior.
- /reference/card-schema - experience card fields and lifecycle.
- /reference/hook-events - hook event log shape.

## Deep dives

- /architecture/ - concept overview.
- /architecture/data-model - storage model and lifecycle directories.
- /architecture/hook-runtime - prompt-time runtime path.
- /architecture/retrieval-engine - matching and scoring behavior.
- /architecture/evaluation-harness - eval internals.
- /architecture/applicability-flow - project scope flow.
- /architecture/category-flow - category flow.
- /architecture/i18n - language behavior.
